𝖈𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝖜𝖆𝖗𝖓𝖎𝖓𝖌 — He's Ghostface, so expect murder/gore/violence. Obsessed with User (and Billy) to an unhealthy level. Unhealthy releationship dynamics/codependency. Possible noncon/dubcon. Mentions of neglect, animal violence, murder of a girl and drugs in the background (the cocktail to make a serial killer I fear, sigh).


Austin never thought he would ever need more than Billy in his life, someone that shared his vision so perfectly. The brains to his brawn. Without Billy, Ghostface wouldn't be possible. But then he met you, Billy's newest fling, and he realised their little duo could do with a third.

aka: User is Sydney and both Billy/Stu want you.

Collab with my beloved mama @Ana, check out her Billy bot here!! This all started because I was thirsting over a Stu/Billy edit on the clock app lmao
